evals.prompt: I just finished Phase 7 integration tests. Run the full test suite to verify everything passes.
evals.expected_output: Test suite runs successfully, confirms 238+ tests passing (unit + integration combined)

assertions.name: test_suite_runs
assertions.description: Test command executes without timing out

assertions.name: success_status_true
assertions.description: JSON response has success: true

assertions.name: tests_found_in_output
assertions.description: Output contains test result summary or test names

evals.prompt: I need to stage all my changes and commit them with the message 'Phase 7 integration tests complete'. Show me what changed first.
evals.expected_output: Shows git status with modified files, then stages changes, then creates commit with specified message

assertions.name: git_status_works
assertions.description: git_status tool runs and shows files

assertions.name: git_add_succeeds
assertions.description: git_add '.' returns success: true

assertions.name: git_commit_succeeds
assertions.description: git_commit with message returns success: true

assertions.name: commit_message_used
assertions.description: Output confirms message 'Phase 7 integration tests complete' was used

evals.prompt: Before I start working on Phase 8, verify the project builds and check all components are present. Show me component count and code metrics.
evals.expected_output: Runs build verification, lists all 13 components, shows line counts per file

assertions.name: build_verify_runs
assertions.description: verify_build executes successfully

assertions.name: components_count_correct
assertions.description: check_components returns count >= 13

assertions.name: component_names_present
assertions.description: Component list includes expected names (MethodBadge, StatusIndicator, etc.)

assertions.name: line_counts_provided
assertions.description: count_lines returns files with line counts for each component

evals.prompt: Push my Phase 7 changes to GitHub. Make sure they're committed first, then push to origin main.
evals.expected_output: Stages changes, commits with appropriate message, pushes to origin/main branch

assertions.name: commit_created
assertions.description: git_commit succeeds with commit message

assertions.name: push_succeeds
assertions.description: git_push origin main returns success: true

assertions.name: no_auth_errors
assertions.description: No 'permission denied' or auth errors in output

evals.prompt: Show me the recent git history to see what work has been done on AgenticOS.
evals.expected_output: Displays last 20 commits with hashes, authors, and commit messages

assertions.name: log_executes
assertions.description: git_log_recent runs without error

assertions.name: commit_hashes_shown
assertions.description: Output contains git commit hashes (7+ character strings)

assertions.name: messages_present
assertions.description: Output includes commit messages (Phase 6, Phase 7, component names, etc.)

evals.prompt: Build a debug version of the app for testing, then verify the build succeeded.
evals.expected_output: Builds debug bundle and returns path to .app file, confirms success

assertions.name: build_debug_runs
assertions.description: build_debug command executes

assertions.name: build_succeeds
assertions.description: Returns success: true

assertions.name: app_path_in_output
assertions.description: Output contains path reference (.app bundle location)

evals.prompt: List all the extracted React components and tell me how many there are.
evals.expected_output: Shows sorted list of component names and total count (should be 13)

assertions.name: components_listed
assertions.description: Response includes component names

assertions.name: count_correct
assertions.description: Total count is 13 or more

assertions.name: component_names_valid
assertions.description: Names match Phase 6 components (MethodBadge, PathDisplay, StatusIndicator, etc.)
